title: selaginella myriostachya
intro: Selaginella myriostachya, also known as the many-branched spikemoss, is a type of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella myriostachya include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil, and its extracts are also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and skin diseases.
